song.title: Away In a Manger
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D Away in a manger, . G D No crib for a bed . A7 The little Lord Jesus . G D Lay down His sweet head . D The stars in the sky . G D Look down where He lay . A7 D The little Lord Jesus .Em (A7) D Asleep on the _hay
[V2] The cattle are lowing, the Baby awakes; But little Lord Jesus, no crying He makes; I love Thee, Lord Jesus, look down from the sky; And stay by my cradle 'til morning is nigh.
[V3] Be near me, Lord Jesus, I ask Thee to stay, Close by me forever, and love me, I pray. Bless all the dear children in Thy tender care, And fit us for Heaven to live with Thee there.
